qq_list.description: QQ numbers to receive automatic likes once per day.
qq_list.hint: Fill in a list of QQ numbers. Each valid QQ number will be liked once per day at a random time.

like_times.description: How many likes to send each time.
like_times.hint: This maps to the OneBot send_like times parameter.

start_hour.hint: 24-hour format. The plugin will randomly schedule likes after this hour each day.

end_hour.hint: 24-hour format. The plugin will randomly schedule likes before this hour each day.
